basic_details.job_title: IIITDM Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow & Senior Research Fellow posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Jabalpur (IIITDM Jabalpur)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Information Technology, Design and Manufacturing, Jabalpur (IIITDM Jabalpur) has published the Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 positions under the IIITDM Jabalpur Recruitment 2026. Candidates below 35 years (JRF) and below 37 years (SRF) holding a Graduate/ Post Graduate degree in Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Data Science, Information Technology, or a related discipline, along with the required research experience for SRF, are eligible to apply online on or before 24 July 2026.

age_limit.age_details: JRF: Below 35 years, SRF: Below 37 years
age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Below 35 years Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Below 37 years

qualification.education_qualification: JRF: Graduate/Post Graduate Degree in Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Data Science, Information Technology or similar. SRF: Same as JRF with two years of research experience.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Graduate / Post Graduate Degree (BE/BTech/ME/MTech) in Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Data Science, Information Technology or similar branches. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Graduate / Post Graduate Degree (BE/BTech/ME/MTech) in Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Data Science, Information Technology or similar branches with two years of research experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA per month. SRF: Rs. 42,000 + 20% HRA per month.
salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA per month. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000 + 20% HRA per month.

selection_process: Written test followed by an Interview Written test for GATE/NET or similar national-level exam-qualified candidates is relaxed as per the Institute norms.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIITDM Jabalpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Jabalpur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Jabalpur Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIITDM Jabalpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIITDM Jabalpur Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Graduate / Post Graduate Degree (BE/BTech/ME/MTech) in Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Data Science, Information Technology or similar branches. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Graduate / Post Graduate Degree (BE/BTech/ME/MTech) in Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Data Science, Information Technology or similar branches with two years of research experience.

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Below 35 years Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Below 37 years

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): Rs. 37,000 + 20% HRA per month. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): Rs. 42,000 + 20% HRA per month.

rows.event: Date of Written Test and Interview

content_sections.heading: IIITDM Jabalpur Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written test followed by an Interview Written test for GATE/NET or similar national-level exam-qualified candidates is relaxed as per the Institute norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIITDM Jabalpur Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIITDM Jabalpur to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIITDM Jabalpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow positions at IIITDM Jabalpur is 24th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow and Senior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with 1 post for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and 1 post for Senior Research Fellow (SRF).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for JRF?
faq.answer: For the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position, candidates need a Graduate/Post Graduate Degree (BE/BTech/ME/MTech) in Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Data Science, Information Technology, or similar branches.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the SRF position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) position is 37 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow (JRF) will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 plus 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a written test followed by an interview. However, the written test may be relaxed for candidates who have qualified in GATE/NET or similar national-level exams.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for IIITDM Jabalpur recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online for these positions through the official website or the provided Google Form link.

faq.question: Q9. What is the date for the written test and interview?
faq.answer: The written test and interview are scheduled to be conducted on 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The direct download link for the official notification PDF can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article.
